powers.label: Velocity Trends
powers.prompt: Show velocity trends for all teams in my vertical over the last 4 sprints: story points committed vs completed, trend direction, and outliers.

powers.label: Sprint Completion Rates
powers.prompt: For each team in my vertical, show current sprint completion rate: done vs total, at-risk items, and predicted end-of-sprint outcome.

powers.label: Carry-Over Analysis
powers.prompt: Identify stories carried over from previous sprints across all teams. Show: ticket, age, reason for carry-over, and impact on delivery.

powers.label: Epic Progress
powers.prompt: Show progress for all active epics across my vertical: percentage complete, remaining stories, target date, and risk level.

powers.label: Cross-Team Blockers
powers.prompt: Identify all blocked tickets across my teams. Show: ticket, blocking reason, which team is blocked, which team can unblock, and age.

powers.label: Stale Items
powers.prompt: Find tickets that haven't moved in 5+ days across all teams. Show: ticket, assignee, status, days stale, and last activity.

powers.label: Dependency Risks
powers.prompt: Analyze cross-team dependencies for the current sprint. Identify items where one team's delivery depends on another team's incomplete work.

powers.label: Risk Register Update
powers.prompt: Generate an updated risk register: new risks identified this week, existing risks with changed probability/impact, and mitigations in progress.

powers.label: Team Capacity
powers.prompt: Show capacity utilization for each team: assigned story points vs available capacity, overloaded members, and unassigned work.

powers.label: AI Adoption Stats
powers.prompt: Show AI adoption metrics across my teams: sessions per developer, AI-assisted PRs percentage, tools usage, and adoption trend.

powers.label: All Teams Standup
powers.prompt: Generate a consolidated standup summary across all my teams: key progress, blockers, and items needing my attention.

powers.label: Quarterly Report Draft
powers.prompt: Generate a quarterly report draft: achievements, metrics (velocity, quality, delivery), risks, roadmap progress, AI adoption, and next quarter priorities.

powers.label: Executive Briefing
powers.prompt: Generate a concise executive briefing (1 page): delivery status, key wins, risks requiring attention, and resource needs. Director-level audience.

powers.label: Weekly Status Email
powers.prompt: Draft a weekly status email for stakeholders: sprint progress, completed items with business value, upcoming milestones, and blockers needing escalation.
